expectations.text: Has subject line and preview text
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'Your beautiful invitation is waiting for you'. Preview: 'We saved your design -- come back and make it official.'

expectations.text: Reassures the user their design/progress is saved
expectations.evidence: 'your invitation design is safe and sound, right where you left it' and 'Your design is ready to go whenever you are.'

expectations.text: Creates soft urgency without being aggressive or guilt-tripping
expectations.evidence: 'Your saved design will be held for a limited time, so we recommend finishing up soon.' Soft urgency, not aggressive.

expectations.text: Includes clear CTA to complete payment/checkout
expectations.evidence: CTA: '[Complete My Purchase]'. Clear and direct.

expectations.text: Mentions the $9.99 price or references the premium template they chose
expectations.evidence: Cart recap: 'Template: Premium Invitation Design / Price: $9.99 / Status: Saved, but not yet live.'

expectations.text: Tone is helpful and understanding, not pushy
expectations.evidence: 'Life gets busy, and sometimes checkout gets interrupted. We totally get it.' Understanding and helpful tone.
Only one version provided. No alternative approaches.
